site.name: Nace Kepa
site.description: CAD design, 3D printing, embedded systems, and full custom builds — engineered end-to-end.

hero.title: Engineering, designed end-to-end.
hero.subtitle: From the first sketch to the firmware, the printed part, and the assembled product — built by one engineer who owns the whole stack.

home.services_sub: Four disciplines, one workflow. Pick one — or hand off the entire project.
home.projects_sub: A few of the things I have made.
home.cta_sub: Tell me about it. I will reply with a quote.

services.heading: Services
services.sub: Four engagements, scoped to fit. Pricing is quoted per project after a short brief.

portfolio.heading: Selected work
portfolio.sub: Each project below was shipped, tested, or printed.

skills.heading: Skills & instruments
skills.sub: Disciplines I practice but do not advertise as standalone services. Useful context — and available if your project needs them.

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.sub: What clients say after the parts ship and the firmware runs.
reviews.cta_sub: Send a few lines about the project — selected reviews get published here.

order.heading: Start a project
order.sub: A short wizard. About two minutes. You will get an indicative estimate before you submit.
order.success_body: Your request is ready in your email client. Hit Send and I will reply within 48 hours. Save the tracking code below — use it in any follow-up.
order.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact via Instagram.
order.estimate_disclaimer: This is a rough estimate generated from your inputs. The final quote follows after I review your brief and files.

labels.services_help: Pick one or more. Pick "Full build" if you want me to handle every stage end-to-end.
labels.type_q: What kind of project is this?
labels.files_help: STL, STEP, OBJ, ZIP or images. Up to 10 MB total.
labels.viewer_drop: Drop a 3D file here or click to upload
labels.deadline_help: Approximate. Mark "flexible" if you have no hard date.
labels.description_q: Describe the project in your own words
labels.description_help: What it does, who it is for, what it must not fail at. Sketches help.
labels.ai_assist: Need help describing? Try the AI assistant
labels.name: Your name
labels.agree: I understand pricing is finalised after Nace reviews this brief.

footer.tagline: Designed and built in Škofja Loka.
footer.made_with: Built with Astro, Tailwind, and a Bambu Lab P1S running in the next room.
